zh.lifeSummary: Dorothy Unknown於1584年出生在英國。她於大約1613年與John Abram Brown結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1674年1月27日在美國羅得島普洛維登斯易亞斯特 普洛維登斯利維爾希德享年90歲，埋葬在美國羅得島普洛維登斯易亞斯特 普洛維登斯安希特 蕾托 內可 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Dorothy Unknown于1584年出生在英国。她于大约1613年与John Abram Brown结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1674年1月27日在美国罗德岛州普洛維登斯易亞斯特 普洛維登斯利維爾希德享年90岁，埋葬在美国罗德岛州普洛維登斯易亞斯特 普洛維登斯安希特 蕾托 內可 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
Oldest grave seen in the memorials list.

en.lifeSummary: Dorothy Unknown was born in 1584, in England. She married John Abram Brown about 1613. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 27 January 1674, in Riverside, East Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, United States, at the age of 90, and was buried in Ancient Little Neck Cemetery, East Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, United States.

it.lifeSummary: Dorothy Unknown è nata il nel 1584 nel England. Lei sposato John Abram Brown circa 1613. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 27 gennaio 1674, nel Riverside, East Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolta a Ancient Little Neck Cemetery, East Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Dorothy Unknownは1584年にイギリスで生まれた。約1613年にJohn Abram Brownと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1674年1月27日にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州プロヴィデンスエアスト プロヴィデンスリバーシドで90歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州プロヴィデンスエアスト プロヴィデンスアンシエント リットル ネック セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy Unknown(은)는 1584년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1613년 John Abram Brown(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1674년 1월 27일 미국 로드아일랜드 주 프로비데스 이스트 프로비데스 라이버시드에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 로드아일랜드 주 프로비데스 이스트 프로비데스 앤시트 리틀 니c크 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Dorothy Unknown nasceu em 1584, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com John Abram Brown aproximadamente 1613. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 27 de janeiro de 1674, em Riverside, East Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América, com 90 anos, e foi sepultada em Ancient Little Neck Cemetery, East Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Dorothy Unknown родилась в 1584 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Abram Brown около 1613 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 27 января 1674 г. в местности ривирсид, эаст провиденс, провиденс, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 90 лет и была похоронена в местности ансиент литл некк кеметири, эаст провиденс, провиденс, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Dorothy Unknown nació en 1584, en Inglaterra. Se casó con John Abram Brown aproximadamente 1613. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 27 de enero de 1674, en Riverside, East Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultada en Ancient Little Neck Cemetery, East Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos.
